case_title: SIGNET BANK/VIRGINIA FDBA BANK OF VIRGINIA vs. TORRES, RENE

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIGNET BANK/VIRGINIA FDBA BANK OF VIRGINIA AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, RENE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGNET BANK/VIRGINIA FDBA BANK OF VIRGINIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, RENE $1,884.10 PRINCIPAL, $288.15 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,252.25 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
